issues: Network policy in Claude Code remote sandbox blocks DNS resolution for *.trycloudflare.com. Could not reach tunnel to check board, commands, status, or post report. Same issue as 2026-05-16 run.
Static analysis of server.py: syntax OK. Scrapers present: walmart, stocktrack, redflagdeals, flipp, shopify (17 stores), homedepot, rona, lcbo, saq, bcldb. No broken URLs detected.
overall: unknown — tunnel unreachable from remote execution environment
env_note: Health agent running in Claude Code on the web (cloud sandbox). Network policy blocks *.trycloudflare.com. To enable live health checks, run the agent via local Claude Code CLI on the same network as the tunnel, or configure a network policy that allows trycloudflare.com.
